store.title: Order a server
store.subtitle: Choose a plan, then configure it to your liking.
store.noProducts: There are currently no products available.

hero.title: Deploy your server in seconds
hero.subtitle: High-performance hosting with instant setup, DDoS protection and 24/7 support. Pick a plan below and you're online in under a minute.

promo.text: New here? Your server deploys instantly the moment checkout completes.

features.heading: Why host with us
features.ddosBody: Always-on mitigation keeps your server online, even under attack.
features.nvmeBody: Blazing-fast disks for quick world loads, plugins and backups.
features.instantBody: Your server is provisioned and ready in under a minute.
features.supportBody: Real people, ready to help whenever you need them.

trust.secureBody: Payments are encrypted and handled by trusted providers.
trust.instantBody: Servers are deployed automatically right after payment.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How fast is my server set up?
faq.a1: Instantly — most servers are deployed and online within a minute of checkout.
faq.q2: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
faq.a2: Yes. You can change your plan at any time from your server's billing page.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: All the methods shown at checkout, including major cards and PayPal where enabled.
faq.a4: Reach out to support within the guarantee window and we'll take care of it.

savings.text: Save up to {{percent}}% with longer billing cycles.

processing.body: We're deploying your server now. This only takes a moment — please don't close this page.
